name: Pbo Snackers (Cookies)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Salt (if using unsalted peanut butter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and position two racks to divide the oven into thirds.
2. Lightly butter two large baking sheets or prepare two nonstick baking sheets.
3. In a large bowl, mix together oats, flour, spices (cinnamon, nutmeg), salt, and baking soda until combined.
4. Cream together butter, peanut butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar on medium speed with an electric mixer for about 3 to 4 minutes, scraping the bowl as needed.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating for 1 minute after each addition.
6. Beat in vanilla extract.
7. Reduce mixer speed to low and gradually add dry ingredients until just blended.
8. Stir in chips or raisins.
9. If using unchilled dough, scoop rounded tablespoonfuls onto the baking sheets. If chilled, scoop into balls between palms, roll them into balls, and place about 2 inches apart on the baking sheets.
10. Press cookies gently with the heel of your hand until they are about 1/2 inch thick.
11. Bake for 13 to 15 minutes or until golden and firm around the edges.
12. Using a wide metal spatula, lift cookies onto a cooling rack. They will firm as they cool. Repeat until all dough is used.
